differential_diagnoses: Inappropriate ICD shocks or therapy due to sustained supraventricular tachycardia (e.g., atrial flutter)
Hypovolemia (e.g., secondary to diuretic therapy or inadequate intake)
next_steps: Immediate transfer to an emergency department with cardiac monitoring and resuscitation capabilities
Urgent ICD interrogation and device data review
Cardiac biomarkers (Troponin), chemistry panel (electrolytes/renal function), and CBC
Point-of-care cardiac ultrasound to assess wall motion, valve function, and filling pressures
Chest X-ray to evaluate for pulmonary congestion
Fluid resuscitation or adjustment of diuretic therapy pending assessment of volume status
